fixes.title: Fix mobile menu max-height calculation
fixes.description: Added updateMenuMaxHeight() to HeaderMain.js. Computes window.innerHeight - header.getBoundingClientRect().top - header.offsetHeight, clamped to minimum 200px, and sets --menu-max-height on the header element. Called in openMenu(), on window resize when menu is open, and on scroll when menu is open (!isDesktop()). In HeaderMain.php and HeaderMain.tsx: replaced menu-open:max-h-[calc(100dvh-var(--fixed-offset,80px))] with menu-open:max-h-(--menu-max-height) (PHP) and max-md:max-h-(--menu-max-height) (TSX isMenuOpen branch).

fixes.title: Fix hamburger toggle button visibility
fixes.description: Removed **:w-full **:h-auto wildcard descendant selectors from the hamburger button className in both HeaderMain.php and HeaderMain.tsx. In PHP: added w-full to each span wrapper around the SVG (span class='w-full block menu-open:hidden' and span class='w-full hidden menu-open:block'). In TSX: added w-full directly to the SVG components (MainMenuOpen className='w-full text-white' and MainMenuClose className='w-full text-white') since the SVG components accept className props.

fixes.title: Fix constant padding breaking closed menu state
fixes.description: Reverted max-md:pt-4 max-md:pb-8 from always-on base classes back to menu-open: conditional (menu-open:pt-4 menu-open:pb-8 in PHP; max-md:pt-4 max-md:pb-8 in the isMenuOpen branch in TSX). Updated transition from max-md:transition-[max-height,opacity] to max-md:transition-[max-height,opacity,padding] in both PHP and TSX so padding animates alongside max-height, preventing a visual jump on open/close.

validation.warningDetails: All warnings are in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs). The htmlStructureSync warning for HeaderMain is expected — TSX editor view intentionally differs from PHP frontend rendering.
